config.label_definition: first foreground transition within the horizon whose package differs from the app current at window end
config.eligibility_definition: actual_next_app is present in the current window's foreground or notified app set after removing current_app

limitations: All labels are derived from deterministic synthetic traces, not real-user behavior.
Accuracy is reported only for context-supported switches; coverage reports how selective that cohort is.
Latency is measured during this run and is not byte-deterministic across machines.
Statistical baselines are trained on the per-scenario train split and evaluated on the held-out test split.
StrongPredictiveActionBaseline is the primary action-value baseline: it ensembles Android-observable recency, notification, frequency, and Markov signals, then pays direct-action costs.
Action-value metrics are deterministic offline estimates; emulator/on-device scripts remain required for causal startup, memory, jank, and bridge latency claims.
